page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7a.64xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 256 dedicated physical cores with 256 vCPUs, indicating a configuration of one thread per core without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, relying entirely on external network-attached storage for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers for distributed environments.

Given its massive scale of 256 dedicated cores and 1024.0 GB of RAM, this instance offers high resource density for enterprise workloads. The dedicated core allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention. It is suited for large-scale general-purpose workloads, high-concurrency web serving, enterprise applications, and distributed processing tasks that require substantial parallel compute capacity without specialized GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7a.64xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 256 dedicated physical cores and 256 vCPUs, operating under a KVM hypervisor with one thread per core. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring network-attached storage for operations. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to handle high-volume data transfers. Designed for massive parallel processing, this instance is suited for enterprise applications, high-concurrency web serving, and large-scale general-purpose workloads requiring dedicated compute resources without virtualization overhead or resource contention.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7a.64xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 256 dedicated cores, 1024 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7a.64xlarge is an x86_64 server with 256 dedicated cores, 1024 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A massive dedicated core instance offering balanced memory and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise-scale parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 256 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core on x86_64 architecture
1024.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Zero local storage and no integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage
Suited for large-scale general-purpose applications and high-concurrency web serving
